title: calcitrapa sicula
intro: Calcitrapa sicula, also known as the Sicilian rocket or broomrapes, is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Calcitrapa sicula has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of calcitrapa sicula can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
